beats.say: Welcome to the portfolio of Thomas Iwainski, a Senior Software Engineer based in Sydney, Australia, with over ten years of experience building scalable web and desktop applications.
The site ships with a polished theme switcher. With a single click you can move between a bright light mode and a sleek, focused dark mode.
At the heart of the page is an interactive career and education timeline, tracing every role from today all the way back to the very first developer job.
Selecting any role opens a rich detail page, with the full story of the work, key achievements, responsibilities, and the technology stack behind it.
A single click on Back to Timeline returns you right where you left off, keeping navigation effortless throughout.
Fast, responsive, and built with Next.js and Tailwind. Thanks for watching, and feel free to connect on GitHub or LinkedIn.
